name: SENTIENT BRANDS HOLDINGS INC.
summary: Sentient Brands Holdings Inc. (SNBH) is a Nevada-based product development and brand management company focused on luxury and premium consumer goods. Its primary product line, Oeuvre, is a luxury skincare collection comprising four products built on a proprietary botanical and gemstone complex. The company sells direct-to-consumer via e-commerce and through wholesale partners, targeting high-earning millennials and Gen Z consumers in the wellness and responsible luxury segments.

products.name: Oeuvre Artistry Collection
products.description: Luxury skincare line of four products (Purifying Exfoliator, Replenishing Facial Oil, Ultra-Nourishing Face Cream, Revitalizing Eye Cream) using proprietary OE Complex of botanicals and gemstones.

partnerships.description: Exchange Agreement closed April 10, 2025 whereby subsidiary AIGFB acquires AIG assets in exchange for acquisition credits convertible to SNBH common stock.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
